scripts.Uitests: rmdir /s /q allure-results & npx playwright test searchDestinationTestSA.spec.js --reporter=line,allure-playwright & allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report
scripts.currentTest: npx playwright test verify_dynamicID.test.ts --reporter=line,allure-playwright & allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report & allure open allure-report
scripts.currentTestWithoutAllureopen: rmdir /s /q allure-results & npx playwright test verify_dynamicID.test.ts --reporter=line,allure-playwright & allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report
